# Clawperator Documentation

This site contains the canonical technical documentation for Clawperator, a deterministic Android automation runtime for AI agents. Clawperator is the actuator. Your external agent or LLM is the brain.

## Key pages

- Full compiled docs on docs host: https://docs.clawperator.com/llms-full.txt
- Full compiled docs on landing host: https://clawperator.com/llms-full.txt
- Docs home: https://docs.clawperator.com/
- Agent quickstart: https://docs.clawperator.com/ai-agents/agent-quickstart/
- Node API agent guide: https://docs.clawperator.com/ai-agents/node-api-for-agents/
- Execution model: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/execution-model/
- Device and package model: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/device-and-package-model/
- Snapshot format: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/snapshot-format/
- Operator LLM playbook: https://docs.clawperator.com/design/operator-llm-playbook/
- API overview: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/api-overview/
- CLI reference: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/cli-reference/
- Error codes: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/error-codes/
- Error handling guide: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/error-handling/
- Environment variables: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/environment-variables/
- First-time setup: https://docs.clawperator.com/getting-started/first-time-setup/
- Troubleshooting: https://docs.clawperator.com/troubleshooting/troubleshooting/
- Architecture: https://docs.clawperator.com/architecture/architecture/

## GitHub

- Main repository: https://github.com/clawperator/clawperator
- Skills repository: https://github.com/clawperator/clawperator-skills

## Guidance for agents

- Prefer this docs site over the marketing homepage for technical behavior.
- The Node API is strict and contract-driven.
- Clawperator executes validated actions and returns structured results.
- Reasoning and planning stay in the external agent.
